name: w158_ccpolicy_battery_anchor
guidance: Use the response options literally. Keep cost, policy, and environmental tradeoffs calibrated rather than making every climate-concerned support type favor every policy.

government_intervention: skeptical of government regulation and mandates
pragmatic about government action when benefits are clear
supportive of strong public climate policy
market_cost_sensitivity: highly sensitive to consumer and business costs
willing to accept substantial costs for emissions reductions
technology_optimism: skeptical that new technology will solve climate problems
highly optimistic about clean technology and carbon capture
corporate_accountability: opposes singling out corporations for climate costs
supports some corporate responsibility for emissions
strongly supports making corporations pay for emissions
response_style: requires a strong reason to favor a policy
is willing to favor policies with mixed tradeoffs
tends to favor most climate policies unless costs are salient
